heading: Confidentiality of information concerning nature and location of archaeological resources
label: 470hh Confidentiality of information concerning nature and location of archaeological resources
notes: Amendments2014—Subsec. (a)(1). , which directed substitution of “chapter 3125 of title 54” for “the Act of ()” in subsec. (a)(2), was executed by making the substitution in subsec. (a)(1), to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 113–28716 U.S.C. 469–469cJune 27, 1960

children.text: further the purposes of this chapter or chapter 3125 of title 54, and
not create a risk of harm to such resources or to the site at which such resources are located.

children.heading: Request for disclosure by Governors
children.label: b Request for disclosure by Governors

children.text: the specific site or area for which information is sought,
the purpose for which such information is sought,
a commitment by the Governor to adequately protect the confidentiality of such information to protect the resource from commercial exploitation,
